Core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB runtime dependency to compensate for its removal from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
Core/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or ClassNotFoundException at runtime for javax.xml.bind classes, as JAXB is no longer included in the JDK starting from Java 11.

Plex/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace for Java 21 compatibility.
Plex/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind API is removed from the JDK and standard libraries in Java 11+; code using it will fail to compile or link against the new jakarta namespace.

Plex/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy JAXB implementation dependencies with the modern Glassfish JAXB runtime.
Plex/pom.xml.why_exists: com.sun.xml.bind artifacts are deprecated/removed in favor of org.glassfish.jaxb; using old artifacts may cause runtime linkage errors or missing classes in modern environments.
